description: You are preparing a cognitive neuroscience experiment using an 8-channel EEG cap in the OpenBCI GUI (Synthetic mode). Configure the FFT Plot widget to display only channels 1, 3, 5, and 7 (Fz, Cz, Pz, Oz) while hiding channels 2, 4, 6, and 8. All 8 channels must remain active and visible in the Time Series display and global data stream. The final configuration must show exactly 4 traces in the FFT graph and 8 traces in the Time Series graph.
